description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a broad, flat wooden top featuring a natural wood grain pattern. The tabletop is supported by two robust, X-shaped metal legs, which provide both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The wood surface appears smooth and well-finished, with a medium brown coloration and subtle variations in tone. The metal legs are finished in a matte gray, contrasting with the warmth of the wood. The table's design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. Its sturdy construction and generous surface area make it suitable for communal or work-related activities in urban environments.
description: A modern rectangular table with a smooth wooden top and sturdy X-shaped metal legs, featuring a minimalist design and natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop and both X-shaped metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the slim profile of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and both X-shaped legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the tabletop depth and leg profile.
